✦ Our Story

ABOUT US

Blackstock Prints was born from a simple idea — everyone deserves to wear their story, display their passion, and surround themselves with what they love.

We are a passionate custom printing studio based in India, creating premium quality printed products that are 100% personalized to you. Whether it's a photo of a loved one, your favourite design, or a quote that moves you — we print it with care.

Every order is treated individually. No mass production, no generic designs. Just your idea, brought to life.

✦ Policies

LEGAL POLICIES

📦 Shipping Policy

  • Orders processed within 1–3 business days
  • Delivery across India via trusted couriers
  • Tracking details shared on WhatsApp
  • Delivery time: 3–7 business days

↩️ Return & Refund

  • Custom products are non-returnable unless defective
  • Damaged or wrong prints — full replacement/refund
  • Report issues within 48 hours of delivery
  • Contact us on WhatsApp with photos

🔒 Privacy Policy

  • Your personal data is never shared or sold
  • Design files used only for your order
  • WhatsApp conversations are private & secure
  • We comply with Indian data protection norms

📋 Terms of Use

  • Orders confirmed only after design approval
  • Payment via UPI/bank transfer before printing
  • Do not submit copyrighted designs without rights
  • We reserve the right to decline offensive content
